task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the existing draft order for John Doe.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Drupal Commerce order edit page for a draft order belonging to customer 'johndoe' or 'John Doe'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Logitech MX Master 3S' was added to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The order items list includes the newly added 'Logitech MX Master 3S' (or SKU 'LOGI-MXM3S') while still retaining the original 'Sony WH-1000XM5' item.

task_completion.description: Verify the billing street address was updated to 789 Oak Avenue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The billing information section or form displays '789 Oak Avenue' in the street address field.

task_completion.description: Verify the billing city, state, and zip code were updated correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The billing information section or form displays 'Chicago' for the city, 'IL' or 'Illinois' for the state, and '60601' for the zip code.

task_completion.description: Verify the order was transitioned from Draft to a completed or fulfillment stage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The order status/state is displayed as 'Completed' or 'Fulfillment' on the order view page, or a success message indicates the order was placed/transitioned out of the Draft state.

integrity.description: The agent used the Drupal Commerce web interface to modify the order.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser navigating the Drupal admin interface, not terminal commands (like drush) or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the order status or address.
integrity.visual_evidence: No developer console or 'Inspect Element' panels are open in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent modified the actual existing order rather than creating a dummy HTML page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar shows the correct localhost Drupal admin paths (e.g., /admin/commerce/orders/...) and standard Drupal UI elements are present.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target customer: John Doe (username: johndoe, uid: 2). Original order contains 1x Sony WH-1000XM5 (SKU: SONY-WH1000XM5). Added product must be Logitech MX Master 3S (SKU: LOGI-MXM3S). Target billing address: 789 Oak Avenue, Chicago, IL 60601. Final order status must be transitioned out of Draft to a completed/fulfillment state.
